name: CASCADE ICE COMPANY
address: 1315 SE ARMOUR RD STE C, BEND, OR 97702

fr.recommendations: Facilitating emergency response effectiveness on the property could be achieved by ensuring clear and unobstructed access to all primary areas around the main building and associated sections. Addressing potential vehicle congestion, particularly in the parking areas and during peak times, may support smoother entry and exit for emergency vehicles. Enhancing access to the rear of the property, which currently appears limited, might aid in comprehensive coverage for operational activities. Optimizing navigation pathways by designating clear, wide routes within fenced sections can assist in maintaining access and movement for responders. Identifying and marking multiple entry points distinctly could also enhance responder navigation and staging, thereby streamlining emergency operations. Incorporating these strategies could enhance overall safety and efficiency for personnel accessing and operating within the property in emergency situations.

wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing the separation between vegetation and the structure, particularly focusing on reducing concentrations directly adjacent to the building, could help improve defensible space and decrease the likelihood of fire impacting the structure. Managing the scattered trees to minimize their density while maintaining adequate spacing may help reduce fuel continuity and can limit potential fire spread. Regular maintenance of the vegetated perimeter, including trimming and possibly creating a fuel break, would support long-term fire resilience by reducing the opportunity for fire to encroach upon the property. Ensuring an open area around the structure and preserving open spaces can further contribute to blocking fire progression and supporting safe firefighter access and suppression efforts.
